bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE z ( id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TABLE w ( id INT, description CLOB, updated_at TIMESTAMP, FOREIGN KEY (id) REFERENCES z(id));
